top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran deal in photos: ships in the Strait of Hormuz, daily life in Tehran
top_signals.summary: The first signs of a post-war recovery are emerging across the Middle East after the United States and Iran signed a memorandum aimed at ending the conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MSCI flags investability concerns in Indonesia over transparency
top_signals.summary: Global index provider has warned it could downgrade south-east Asian country to a ‘frontier market’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Short-Bond Rally Faces Risks From Cash Drain, Analysts Say
top_signals.summary: A blazing rally in India’s short-end bonds, driven by plans to attract foreign capital, may fizzle out because the central bank is expected to drain excess cash from the financial system, according to analysts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
